lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 ghar 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl, First House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਹੀ ਕੀ ਸਿਰਕਾਰ ਹੈ ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਕਾ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jis hee kee sirakaar hai tis hee kaa sabh koe |
lines.english: Everyone belongs to the One who rules the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜਿਸ ਕੈ ਸਚੁ ਵਸੈ ਸਚੇ ਸਚੀ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar jis kai sach vasai sache sachee soe |
lines.english: True is the reputation of the true, within whom truth abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵਣੀ ਸਚੁ ਘਟਿ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh kaar kamaavanee sach ghatt paragatt hoe |
lines.english: The Gurmukh practices good deeds, and the truth is revealed in the heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਮਿਲੇ ਸੇ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜਹਿ ਤਿਨ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sach mile se na vichhurreh tin nij ghar vaasaa hoe |1|
lines.english: Those who meet the True Lord are not separated again; they come to dwell in the home of the self deep within. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਮੈ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਨੁ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: mere raam mai har bin avar na koe |
lines.english: O my Lord! Without the Lord, I have no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਸਚੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satagur sach prabh niramalaa sabad milaavaa hoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The True Guru leads us to meet the Immaculate True God through the Word of His Shabad. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੋ ਮਿਲਿ ਰਹੈ ਜਿਸ ਨਉ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad milai so mil rahai jis nau aape le milaae |
lines.english: One whom the Lord merges into Himself is merged in the Shabad, and remains so merged.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੈ ਭਾਇ ਕੋ ਨਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: doojai bhaae ko naa milai fir fir aavai jaae |
lines.english: No one merges with Him through the love of duality; over and over again, they come and go in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਇਕੁ ਵਰਤਦਾ ਏਕੋ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh meh ik varatadaa eko rahiaa samaae |
lines.english: The One Lord permeates all. The One Lord is pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੜਿ ਪੜਿ ਪੰਡਿਤ ਜੋਤਕੀ ਵਾਦ ਕਰਹਿ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: parr parr panddit jotakee vaad kareh beechaar |
lines.english: After all their reading, the Pandits, the religious scholars, and the astrologers argue and debate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨਉ ਆਪਿ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੋਇ ਸੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis nau aap deaal hoe so guramukh naam samaae |2|
lines.english: That Gurmukh, unto whom the Lord shows His Kindness, is absorbed in the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਭਵੀ ਨ ਬੁਝਈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਲੋਭ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: mat budh bhavee na bujhee antar lobh vikaar |
lines.english: Their intellect and understanding are perverted; they just don't understand. They are filled with greed and corruption.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਭਰਮਦੇ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh bharamade bhram bhram hoe khuaar |
lines.english: Through 8.4 million incarnations they wander lost and confused; through all their wandering and roaming, they are ruined.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਮੇਟਣਹਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: poorab likhiaa kamaavanaa koe na mettanahaar |3|
lines.english: They act according to their pre-ordained destiny, which no one can erase. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ਗਾਖੜੀ ਸਿਰੁ ਦੀਜੈ ਆਪੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: satagur kee sevaa gaakharree sir deejai aap gavaae |
lines.english: It is very difficult to serve the True Guru. Surrender your head; give up your selfishness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਹਿ ਤਾ ਹਰਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਸੇਵਾ ਪਵੈ ਸਭ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad mileh taa har milai sevaa pavai sabh thaae |
lines.english: Realizing the Shabad, one meets with the Lord, and all one's service is accepted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਸਿ ਪਰਸਿਐ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਹੋਇ ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: paaras parasiai paaras hoe jotee jot samaae |
lines.english: By personally experiencing the Personality of the Guru, one's own personality is uplifted, and one's light merges into the Light.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਭੁਖਾ ਭੁਖਾ ਮਤ ਕਰਹਿ ਮਤ ਤੂ ਕਰਹਿ ਪੂਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: man bhukhaa bhukhaa mat kareh mat too kareh pookaar |
lines.english: O mind, don't cry out that you are hungry, always hungry; stop complaining.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਆਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jin kau poorab likhiaa tin satagur miliaa aae |4|
lines.english: Those who have such pre-ordained destiny come to meet the True Guru. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀਹ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਿਰੀ ਸਭਸੈ ਦੇਇ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: lakh chauraaseeh jin siree sabhasai dee adhaar |
lines.english: The One who created the 8.4 million species of beings gives sustenance to all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਭਉ ਸਦਾ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹੈ ਸਭਨਾ ਕਰਦਾ ਸਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: nirbhau sadaa deaal hai sabhanaa karadaa saar |
lines.english: The Fearless Lord is forever Merciful; He takes care of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਪਾਈਐ ਮੋਖ ਦੁਆਰੁ ॥੫॥੩॥੩੬॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh bujheeai paaeeai mokh duaar |5|3|36|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh understands, and finds the Door of Liberation. ||5||3||36||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਸੁਣਿ ਕੈ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਤਿਨਾ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: jinee sun kai maniaa tinaa nij ghar vaas |
lines.english: Those who hear and believe, find the home of the self deep within.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੇ ਹਉ ਸਦ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਜਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabad rate se niramale hau sad balihaarai jaas |
lines.english: Attuned to the Word of the Shabad, they are immaculate and pure. I am forever a sacrifice to them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਸਾਲਾਹਿ ਸਚੁ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਣਤਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramatee saalaeh sach har paaeaa gunataas |
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, they praise the True Lord; they find the Lord, the Treasure of Excellence.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਰਦੈ ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਵਸੈ ਤਿਤੁ ਘਟਿ ਹੈ ਪਰਗਾਸੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hiradai jin kai har vasai tith ghatt hai paragaas |1|
lines.english: Those people, within whose hearts the Lord abides, are radiant and enlightened. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: man mere har har niramal dhiaae |
lines.english: O my mind, meditate on the Immaculate Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਜਿਨ ਕਉ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਹੇ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhur masatak jin kau likhiaa se guramukh rahe liv laae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those whose have such pre-ordained destiny written on their foreheads-those Gurmukhs remain absorbed in the Lord's Love. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਦੇਖਹੁ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਨਿਕਟਿ ਵਸੈ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har santahu dekhahu nadar kar nikatt vasai bharapoor |
lines.english: O Saints, see clearly that the Lord is near at hand; He is pervading everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਜਿਨੀ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਸੇ ਦੇਖਹਿ ਸਦਾ ਹਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramat jinee pachhaaniaa se dekheh sadaa hadoor |
lines.english: Those who follow the Guru's Teachings realize Him, and see Him Ever-present.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਗੁਣ ਤੈ ਬਾਹਰੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਮਰਦੇ ਝੂਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: manamukh gun tai baahare bin naavai marade jhoor |2|
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are totally without virtue. Without the Name, they die in frustration. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਗੁਣ ਤਿਨ ਸਦ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਅਉਗੁਣਵੰਤਿਆ ਦੂਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin gun tin sad man vasai aaugunavantiaa door |
lines.english: He dwells forever in the minds of the virtuous. He is far removed from those worthless people who lack virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭਗਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin bhagatee ratiaa man tan niramal hoe |
lines.english: Night and day, they are steeped in devotion; their minds and bodies become pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਸਬਦਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਸੁਣਿ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਮਨਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jin sabad guroo sun maniaa tin man dhiaaeaa har soe |
lines.english: Those who hear and believe in the Word of the Guru's Shabad, meditate on the Lord in their minds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੁ ਹੈ ਓਹੁ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਥਿਰੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jis andar naam pragaas hai ohu sadaa sadaa thir hoe |3|
lines.english: Those who have the Radiant Light of the Naam within, become steady and stable, forever and ever. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂੜਾ ਰੰਗੁ ਕਸੁੰਭ ਕਾ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਜਾਇ ਦੁਖੁ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: koorraa rang kasunbh kaa binas jaae dukh roe |
lines.english: The color of the world is false and weak; when it washes away, people cry out in pain.
